source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/5. Rechargeable battery/085-28224697-000 TRF_CB.pdf

document.title: TEST REPORT IEC 62133-2, Report Number 085-28224697-000
authorityOrJurisdiction: NCB TÜV SÜD PSB Pte. Ltd.

sourceSummary.oneLine: CB Scheme IEC 62133-2 test report for rechargeable Li-polymer battery model DABP8S1PA using cell model FBC803070.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory and safety conformity evidence for a portable rechargeable lithium battery under IEC 62133-2 and Republic of Korea national differences.
keyPoints: The samples comply with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
The product fulfils the requirements of EN 62133-2:2017/A1:2021.
Republic of Korea national differences are attached according to KC62133-2(2020-07).
Battery model DABP8S1PA is rated 29.6 Vd.c., 1470 mAh and has cell configuration 8S1P.
The final evaluation of the battery must be conducted in the end product for which the battery will be used.

evidence.claim: The tested item is a rechargeable Li-polymer battery model DABP8S1PA.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description: Rechargeable Li-polymer Battery; Model/Type reference: DABP8S1PA

evidence.claim: Battery model DABP8S1PA is rated 29.6 Vd.c. and 1470 mAh.
The battery consists of 8 cells in series using cell model FBC803070.
evidence.evidenceText: The Rechargeable Li-polymer Battery, Model DABP8S1PA is used for portable appliance and consists of 8 cells in series, cell model: FBC803070.

evidence.claim: Testing was performed under IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021 using the CB Scheme.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard: IEC 62133-2:2017, IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021; Test procedure: CB Scheme

evidence.claim: The samples comply with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
evidence.evidenceText: The samples comply with the requirements of IEC 62133-2:2017, IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
The product fulfils the requirements of EN 62133-2:2017/A1:2021.

evidence.claim: Republic of Korea national differences are addressed.
evidence.evidenceText: Summary of compliance with National Differences (List of countries addressed): Republic of Korea
evidence.pageTarget: KC62133-2 Republic of Korea National Differences

evidence.claim: The Republic of Korea national differences attachment is according to KC62133-2(2020-07).
evidence.evidenceText: Differences according to: National standard KC62133-2(2020-07)

evidence.claim: The test item was received on 2024-12-28 and tested from 2025-01-09 to 2025-01-17.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of receipt of test item: 2024-12-28; Date(s) of performance of tests: 2025-01-09 to 2025-01-17

evidence.claim: The battery uses a manufacturer-declared charging method of 730 mA constant current to 33.6 V, then 33.6 V constant voltage until 30 mA.
evidence.evidenceText: Charge at constant current 730mA until voltage reaches 33.6V, then charge at constant voltage 33.6V till charge current is 30mA.

evidence.claim: The battery final voltage is 24.0 V and upper limit charging voltage per cell is 4.2 V.
evidence.evidenceText: Specified final voltage: 24.0V; Upper limit charging voltage per cell: 4.2V

evidence.claim: Battery marking was assessed as compliant and marked as specified in IEC 61960-3:2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Batteries are marked as specified in IEC 61960, except for coin batteries; Battery marked as specified in IEC 61960-3:2017; Verdict P

evidence.claim: The report states the final evaluation of the battery must be conducted in the end product.
evidence.evidenceText: The final evaluation of the battery must be conducted in the end product for which the battery will be used.

evidence.claim: The forced internal short-circuit cell test had no fire results.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.3.9 Design evaluation – Forced internal short-circuit (cells); Results: no fire

evidence.claim: The over-charging of battery test had no fire and no explosion results.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.3.6 Over-charging of battery; Results: no fire, no explosion

evidence.claim: The critical components table lists the lithium-ion cell FBC803070 with CB Certificate No. SG PSB-BT-05720.
evidence.evidenceText: Lithium-ion Cell; FULLYMAX BATTERY CO., LTD; FBC803070; CB Certif. No.: SG PSB-BT-05720

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document revision or version for the report itself is provided; revisionOrVersion is left empty.
The marking plate and photo label artwork are described as possibly draft artwork and certification mark use requires authorization by the respective NCBs.
Cell nominal voltage appears as 3.8 Vd.c. in general product information but 3.7 Vd.c. in the critical components table; preserve both only with source-specific context if used.
